title: Rhubarb
writer: Dorothy Davenport, Francis M. Cockrell, H. Allen Smith
actors: Ray Milland, Jan Sterling, Gene Lockhart
plot: Rich, eccentric T.J. Banner adopts a feral cat who becomes an affectionate pet. Then T.J. dies, leaving to Rhubarb most of his money and a pro baseball team, the Brooklyn Loons. When the team protests, publicist Eric Yeager convin...
